\tzpentry{ID5808}{Quantum Potential Energy Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5808 introduces Quantum Potential Energy Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{\mathcal{U}}[t,t_0] = \mathcal{T}\exp\left[-\frac{i}{\hbar}\int_{t_0}^t \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{total}}[\tau] d\tau\right] \end{equation}
